biotech.title: Gene Expression Profiling Workbench
biotech.summary: A genomics workbench concept for gathering sequencing sources, profiling expression signatures, and surfacing disease-linked targets through a cleaner browser-first analysis layer.

biotech.title: BioBody Insights
biotech.summary: An interactive whole-body systems biology atlas for exploring how genes, proteins, pathways, and metabolic flux map onto tissues through a visual organ-anchored interface.

biotech.title: Network Pulse Analyzer
biotech.summary: A translational biological network intelligence interface for tracing disease-linked pathways, tissue effects, and signaling relationships across connected biological programs.

biotech.title: Disease Target Atlas
biotech.summary: A planned interface for comparing candidate causal pathways, expression shifts, and intervention opportunities across disease programs without requiring a heavyweight local analysis stack.

mlai.title: Neural Pulse Play
mlai.summary: A browser-based neurotechnology sandbox combining EEG review, topographic brain visualization, and a DBS-inspired stimulation playground for interactive neural system exploration.

mlai.title: Live Vision Model Lab
mlai.summary: A standalone installable browser vision playground for realtime webcam, image, and video inference with switchable TensorFlow.js and face-api.js models.
highlights: Installable demo for webcam and uploads

mlai.title: EEG 3D Activity Viewer
mlai.summary: A work-in-progress browser interface for mapping uploaded EEG sessions onto a three-dimensional brain view so activity patterns can be explored more intuitively.

other.title: Instagram Photo Reel Archive
other.summary: A planned editorial gallery and reel companion for turning social-first visual work into a cleaner, portfolio-grade archive with stronger sequencing and presentation.

other.title: Pokemon Card Scanner & Deck Valuation
other.summary: A playful scanner and deck companion concept for recognising cards, estimating collection value, and giving traders a cleaner way to review deck-level worth.

media.title: Monochrome Lab Portrait
media.summary: A quiet portrait study with minimal palette and directional light.

media.title: Field Notes in Motion
media.summary: A short-form reel style sequence balancing travel atmosphere with research textures.

media.title: Coastal Editorial Frame
media.summary: Editorial still with cinematic color treatment and spatial negative space.

media.title: Lab Bench Sequence
media.summary: Textural frames from biotech experimentation and instrumentation details.
